title: Support multi-expression sequences
body:
This is a reimplementation of https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/6577 done using a decision tree. Sequences are transformed into a graph and then back to the AST. This allows generic handling of sequence expressions and leaves a room for optimization as well. Supported expressions:

###  `a ##1 b`

Implemented as:
```verilog

if (a)
    ##1;
    if (b) passsp
    else failsp
else failsp
```

### `##1 a ##2 b`

Implemented as:
```verilog
    ##1;
    if (a)
        ##2;
        if (b) passsp
        else failsp
    else failsp
```

### `a ##1 b ##2 c`

Implemented as:
```verilog
    if (a)
        ##1;
        if (b)
            ##2;
            if (c) passsp
            else failsp
        else failsp
    else failsp
```

Transformation is mainly done in V3AssertProperties. Properties are wrapped in AstPExpr that are handled by V3Assert.
Handling of `pass`/`fail` statements is done by introducing a placeholder node: AstPExprClause that is replaced in V3Assert as well.

Attaching property graph for the sequences above:
![Vt_property_sexpr_016_properties dot](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/96bb6bad-5625-49ba-8605-18c655dec8b7)
